name: commit-gen
description: Generate Conventional Commits commit messages from Git changes using Codex or Claude Code CLI.

commitGen.provider.description: CLI provider used to generate commit messages.

commitGen.codexCommand.description: Executable used when Commit Gen provider is codex.

commitGen.codexModel.description: Model passed to Codex CLI with --model. Use an empty string to let Codex choose its configured default.

commitGen.codexArgs.description: Arguments passed to the Codex CLI. The prompt is sent to stdin unless an argument contains ${prompt}.

commitGen.claudeCommand.description: Executable used when Commit Gen provider is claude.

commitGen.claudeModel.description: Model passed to Claude Code CLI with --model. The default Claude Haiku model is intended for simple low-cost generation.

commitGen.claudeArgs.description: Arguments passed to the Claude Code CLI. The prompt is sent to stdin unless an argument contains ${prompt}.

commitGen.diffMode.description: Git changes used as commit-message context.

commitGen.language.description: Language for the generated commit message, for example en or ko.

commitGen.includeBody.description: Controls whether the generated commit message may include a body.

commitGen.maxDiffChars.description: Maximum number of Git context characters sent to the CLI.

commitGen.timeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for the selected CLI.

commitGen.customInstructions.description: Additional style or policy instructions appended to the generation prompt.
